pct_rsv.long_name: Percentage of patients with RSV vaccination
pct_rsv.short_description: Percent of patients with an RSV vaccination, among those with any encounter at an Epic Cosmos network facility.
pct_rsv.long_description: Among patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network hospitals and health systems, the percentage who received an RSV vaccine. Data are stratified by age at encounter and ZIP code of residence. Counts of 10 or fewer patients are suppressed and imputed as 5. Percentages are reported as suppressed ('-') when the denominator is too small for reliable estimation.
pct_rsv.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients received an RSV vaccine.

pct_pcv.long_name: Percentage of patients with pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (PCV) within 4 years
pct_pcv.short_description: Percent of patients with a PCV vaccination in the prior 4 years, among those with any encounter at an Epic Cosmos network facility.
pct_pcv.long_description: Among patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network hospitals and health systems, the percentage who received a pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (PCV) within the prior 4 years. Data are stratified by age at encounter and ZIP code of residence. Counts of 10 or fewer patients are suppressed and imputed as 5. Percentages are reported as suppressed ('-') when the denominator is too small for reliable estimation.
pct_pcv.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients received a PCV vaccine within the prior 4 years.

pct_zoster.long_name: Percentage of patients with zoster (shingles) vaccine within 4 years
pct_zoster.short_description: Percent of patients with a zoster vaccination in the prior 4 years, among those with any encounter at an Epic Cosmos network facility.
pct_zoster.long_description: Among patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network hospitals and health systems, the percentage who received a zoster (shingles) vaccine within the prior 4 years. Data are stratified by age at encounter and ZIP code of residence. Counts of 10 or fewer patients are suppressed and imputed as 5. Percentages are reported as suppressed ('-') when the denominator is too small for reliable estimation.
pct_zoster.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients received a zoster vaccine within the prior 4 years.

pct_flu.long_name: Percentage of patients with influenza vaccination
pct_flu.short_description: Percent of patients with an influenza vaccination, among those with any encounter at an Epic Cosmos network facility.
pct_flu.long_description: Among patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network hospitals and health systems, the percentage who received an influenza vaccine. Data are stratified by age at encounter and ZIP code of residence. Counts of 10 or fewer patients are suppressed and imputed as 5. Percentages are reported as suppressed ('-') when the denominator is too small for reliable estimation.
pct_flu.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients received an influenza vaccine.

n_patients.long_name: Number of patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network facilities
n_patients.short_description: Count of patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network facilities, used as the denominator for immunization rates.
n_patients.long_description: Count of patients with any encounter at Epic Cosmos network hospitals and health systems, stratified by age at encounter and ZIP code of residence. Counts of 10 or fewer are suppressed and imputed as 5.
n_patients.statement: In {location}, {value} patients were seen at Epic Cosmos network facilities.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'
